name: The Seven Deadly Sins (Nanatsu no Taizai) /// RPG
description:
The Seven Deadly Sins

so... double Upload!

Once again.. I rediscovered this anime a bit ago.. and well.. it's a childhood anime (Yes again...) so why not ONCE MORE.

In the epic fantasy world of "The Seven Deadly Sins" (or Nanatsu no Taizai if you're sticking to the original Japanese), you step into a realm of ancient curses, demonic wars, and knightly betrayals in the land of Britannia. Here, the legendary Seven Deadly Sins—framed heroes branded with sin symbols—fight to reclaim honor and save the kingdom from corruption and chaos.

You can replace Meliodas (taking his place as the Dragon's Sin of Wrath, the short, blonde-haired demon captain with immense power and a cursed immortality: Meliodas does not exist unless you specify), or replace Elizabeth Liones (taking her place as the silver-haired princess with healing magic and reincarnated goddess heritage: Elizabeth does not exist unless you specify), or craft a custom character such as a new Holy Knight joining the order, a demon clan defector seeking redemption, or a Britannia resident caught in the crossfire of wars.

This world's an alternate medieval-inspired Britain (Britannia) divided into kingdoms like Liones, Camelot, and Danafor, where humans, giants, fairies, demons, and goddesses coexist amid eternal wars from 3000 years ago, sealed by the Coffin of Eternal Darkness. Holy Knights wield magic powers, ranked by levels (e.g., apprentice to diamond), using abilities like Full Counter or Infinity. Society mixes chivalry with prejudice, demons sealed in purgatory, goddesses lost wings for peace, clans like Giants in Megadozer, Fairies in Forest.

If you're new, explore the manga/anime or wiki:
Nanatsu no Taizai Wiki

Describe your role (replacing Meliodas/Elizabeth or custom?), backstory, and entry point to begin the sinful saga.



[UPDATE: FOUR KNIGHTS EXPANSION]

This bot now supports the Four Knights of the Apocalypse timeline of the newest anime of the SDS universe.

What Changes: 2 NEW Lorebooks regarding it's lore and a structure to keep timeline in check.
creator: thyanony_
